derivations_verified.02_klein_gordon: PASS - causal d'Alembertian Box_tilde constructed; WKB O(hbar^-2), O(hbar^-1), O(hbar^0) orders symbolically verified
derivations_verified.03b_disformal_signpost: PASS - disformal metric departs from conformal/Minkowski unless B(phi)(nabla phi)^2 -> 0

conclusion: Standard Dirac operator emerges as the local limit of the geometric operator in the isochronous background
